zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Braose於大約1366年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston57歲，母親Joan Howard27歲。她於1385年與Hugh Shirley在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年4月20日在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Braose于大约1366年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston57岁，母亲Joan Howard27岁。她于1385年与Hugh Shirley在英国英格兰素可維斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年4月20日在英国英格兰素可維斯頓享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Braose was born about 1366, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston, was 57 and her mother, Joan Howard, was 27. She married Hugh Shirley in 1385, in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 20 April 1440, in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Braose est née environ 1366, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Joan Howard, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Shirley en 1385, à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1440, à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Braose um 1366 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston 57 und ihre Mutter Joan Howard 27. Sie hat 1385 in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Hugh Shirley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. April 1440 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Braose è nata il circa 1366 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Joan Howard, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Shirley nel 1385, nel Wiston, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1440, nel Wiston, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Braoseが約1366年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winstonは57歳，母Joan Howardは27歳であった。1385年にイギリスイギリススセックスウィストンでHugh Shirleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年4月20日にイギリスイギリススセックスウィストンで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Braose(이)가 대략 1366년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Howard(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 와이스턴에서 Hugh Shirley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 4월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 와이스턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Braose nasceu aproximadamente 1366, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Joan Howard, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Shirley em 1385, em Wiston, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1440, em Wiston, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Braose родилась около 1366 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Howard, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Shirley в 1385 г. в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 20 апреля 1440 г. в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice Braose nació aproximadamente 1366, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Piers Peter Braose Brewse Lord of Winston, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Joan Howard, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Hugh Shirley en 1385, en Wiston, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1440, en Wiston, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
